meta_title: For Freelancers: content creation to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to content creation and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Content Creation to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to leverage content creation and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster and ship client projects.
content.answer_block: When you cannot debug code, stop staring at the monitor. Instead, use content creation—specifically documentation and technical breakdown—to externalize your logic. By mapping your application flow into structured prompts for Antigravity and Claude Code, you force the machine to identify the architectural drift causing your silent failures.
content.intro:
The screen is a blur of red stack traces and the client is asking for an update. You are stuck in the 'debugging loop,' losing hours to a bug that should have taken minutes to squash. The frustration isn't just about the code; it is about the erosion of your reputation as a high-velocity freelancer.

But what if you changed your workflow? By shifting your focus from manual line-by-line inspection to systematic content creation—documenting your logic as you build—you turn the debugging process from a guessing game into a rigorous engineering exercise. It is time to stop fighting the code and start architecting your way out of the deadlock.

steps.title: Map the Failure Point
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the scope. Document exactly where the state deviates from expectations to provide context for your AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this code block and identify the specific state mismatch. Map the input flow against the expected output architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/logic.ts --ask 'Identify why the function returns null here'

steps.title: Externalize Logic via Documentation
steps.description: Write a brief 'Technical Intent' doc for the feature. This forces you to clarify the requirement, which often reveals the bug in your logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on my intent doc, verify if the current implementation matches the business logic constraints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write ./docs/intent.md --content 'Describe the intended data flow for this module'

steps.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Generate tests that fail predictably to isolate the bug, making it easier for AI to suggest a fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of edge-case unit tests for this function to expose the current failure mode.

steps.title: Refactor with Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Feed your documented intent and failing tests into the AI to suggest a refactor that adheres to your architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this module to pass the new test suite while maintaining the existing interface.

steps.title: Final Verification & Deployment
steps.description: Validate the fix against the original intent and ensure no regressions were introduced elsewhere in the codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the final code for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities before I commit.

pro_tips: Always keep a 'Bug Journal' as a markdown file; patterns in your bugs reveal gaps in your own learning.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation comments as you write code, not after, to keep context fresh.
If a bug persists, ask the AI to 'explain the code as if I were a junior dev'—the shift in perspective often reveals your own blind spots.
Treat your prompts like code; version control your best debugging prompt templates in a dedicated repo.
Use Antigravity to simulate environment variables and state snapshots to replicate production bugs locally.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your current module, integrate these documentation steps into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the quality assurance process for future projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your freelance schedule. Master the art of structured content creation and AI-assisted debugging to deliver superior software at double the speed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
